src/App.tsx:const addToWhitelist = async (email: string, role: string, academyId?: string) => {
src/App.tsx:  if (!email) return;
src/App.tsx:  try {
src/App.tsx:    await setDoc(doc(db, 'whitelist', email.toLowerCase()), {
src/App.tsx:      email: email.toLowerCase(),
src/App.tsx:      role,
src/App.tsx:      academy_id: academyId || '',
src/App.tsx:      created_at: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:  } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:    console.error('Error adding to whitelist:', error);
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const calculateAge = (birthDate: string) => {
src/App.tsx:  if (!birthDate) return 0;
src/App.tsx:  const today = new Date();
src/App.tsx:  const birth = new Date(birthDate);
src/App.tsx:  let age = today.getFullYear() - birth.getFullYear();
src/App.tsx:  const m = today.getMonth() - birth.getMonth();
src/App.tsx:  if (m < 0 || (m === 0 && today.getDate() < birth.getDate())) {
src/App.tsx:    age--;
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:  return age;
src/App.tsx:};

src/App.tsx:// --- Error Handling ---
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:enum OperationType {
src/App.tsx:  CREATE = 'create',
src/App.tsx:  UPDATE = 'update',
src/App.tsx:  DELETE = 'delete',
src/App.tsx:  LIST = 'list',
src/App.tsx:  GET = 'get',
src/App.tsx:  WRITE = 'write',
src/App.tsx:}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:interface FirestoreErrorInfo {
src/App.tsx:  error: string;
src/App.tsx:  operationType: OperationType;
src/App.tsx:  path: string | null;
src/App.tsx:  authInfo: {
src/App.tsx:    userId: string | undefined;
src/App.tsx:    email: string | null | undefined;
src/App.tsx:    emailVerified: boolean | undefined;
src/App.tsx:    isAnonymous: boolean | undefined;
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:function handleFirestoreError(error: unknown, operationType: OperationType, path: string | null) {
src/App.tsx:  const errInfo: FirestoreErrorInfo = {
src/App.tsx:    error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
src/App.tsx:    authInfo: {
src/App.tsx:      userId: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/App.tsx:      email: auth.currentUser?.email,
src/App.tsx:      emailVerified: auth.currentUser?.emailVerified,
src/App.tsx:      isAnonymous: auth.currentUser?.isAnonymous,
src/App.tsx:    },
src/App.tsx:    operationType,
src/App.tsx:    path
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:  console.error('Firestore Error: ', JSON.stringify(errInfo));
src/App.tsx:  alert(`Erro ao realizar operação (${operationType}): ${errInfo.error}. Por favor, verifique sua conexão ou permissões.`);
src/App.tsx:}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:interface ErrorBoundaryProps {
src/App.tsx:  children: React.ReactNode;
src/App.tsx:}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:interface ErrorBoundaryState {
src/App.tsx:  hasError: boolean;
src/App.tsx:  error: any;
src/App.tsx:}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:class ErrorBoundary extends React.Component<ErrorBoundaryProps, ErrorBoundaryState> {
src/App.tsx:  state: ErrorBoundaryState = { hasError: false, error: null };
src/App.tsx:  constructor(props: ErrorBoundaryProps) {
src/App.tsx:    super(props);
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  static getDerivedStateFromError(error: any): ErrorBoundaryState {
src/App.tsx:    return { hasError: true, error };
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  render() {
src/App.tsx:    if (this.state.hasError) {
src/App.tsx:      return (
src/App.tsx:        <div className="min-h-screen bg-zinc-950 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
src/App.tsx:          <div className="bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 p-8 rounded-3xl max-w-md w-full text-center">
src/App.tsx:            <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-rose-500/20 text-rose-500 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-6">
src/App.tsx:              <ZapOff size={32} />
src/App.tsx:            </div>
src/App.tsx:            <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Ops! Algo deu errado</h1>
src/App.tsx:            <p className="text-zinc-400 text-sm mb-6">
src/App.tsx:              Ocorreu um erro inesperado. Por favor, tente recarregar a página.
src/App.tsx:            </p>
src/App.tsx:            <button 
src/App.tsx:              onClick={() => window.location.reload()}
src/App.tsx:              className="w-full bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-600 text-white font-bold py-3 rounded-xl transition-all"
src/App.tsx:            >
src/App.tsx:              Recarregar Aplicativo
src/App.tsx:            </button>
src/App.tsx:            {process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development' && (
src/App.tsx:              <pre className="mt-6 p-4 bg-black/50 rounded-lg text-left text-[10px] text-rose-400 overflow-auto max-h-40">
src/App.tsx:                {(this as any).state.error?.message}
src/App.tsx:              </pre>
src/App.tsx:            )}
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:      );
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    return (this as any).props.children;
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:}

src/App.tsx:const CommunityView = ({ athletes, academyId }: { athletes: Athlete[], academyId: string }) => {
src/App.tsx:  const [posts, setPosts] = useState<Post[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:  const [newPostContent, setNewPostContent] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const [isPosting, setIsPosting] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!academyId) return;
src/App.tsx:    const q = query(
src/App.tsx:      collection(db, 'posts'), 
src/App.tsx:      where('academy_id', '==', academyId),
src/App.tsx:      orderBy('created_at', 'desc'), 
src/App.tsx:      limit(20)
src/App.tsx:    );
src/App.tsx:    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
src/App.tsx:      const postsData = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as Post));
src/App.tsx:      setPosts(postsData);
src/App.tsx:    }, (error) => handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.LIST, 'posts'));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return () => unsubscribe();
src/App.tsx:  }, [academyId]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleCreatePost = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!newPostContent.trim() || !academyId) return;
src/App.tsx:    setIsPosting(true);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const user = auth.currentUser;
src/App.tsx:      if (!user) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const athlete = athletes.find(a => a.user_id === user.uid);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'posts'), {
src/App.tsx:        academy_id: academyId,
src/App.tsx:        athlete_id: athlete?.id || 'system',
src/App.tsx:        athlete_name: athlete?.name || 'Sistema PAC',
src/App.tsx:        content: newPostContent,
src/App.tsx:        type: 'manual',
src/App.tsx:        likes_count: 0,
src/App.tsx:        comments_count: 0,
src/App.tsx:        created_at: new Date().toISOString()
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      setNewPostContent('');
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.CREATE, 'posts');
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setIsPosting(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleLike = async (postId: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const postRef = doc(db, 'posts', postId);
src/App.tsx:      await updateDoc(postRef, {
src/App.tsx:        likes_count: increment(1)
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.UPDATE, `posts/${postId}`);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="space-y-6 max-w-2xl mx-auto">

src/App.tsx:              disabled={isPosting || !newPostContent.trim()}

src/App.tsx:const useAlerts = () => {
src/App.tsx:  const [alerts, setAlerts] = useState<Alert[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const user = auth.currentUser;
src/App.tsx:    if (!user) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const q = query(
src/App.tsx:      collection(db, 'alerts'),
src/App.tsx:      where('user_id', '==', user.uid),
src/App.tsx:      limit(20)
src/App.tsx:    );
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
src/App.tsx:      const fetchedAlerts = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as Alert));
src/App.tsx:      // Sort in memory to avoid composite index requirement
src/App.tsx:      fetchedAlerts.sort((a, b) => {
src/App.tsx:        const dateA = (a.created_at as any)?.toMillis?.() || (a.created_at ? new Date(a.created_at as any).getTime() : 0);
src/App.tsx:        const dateB = (b.created_at as any)?.toMillis?.() || (b.created_at ? new Date(b.created_at as any).getTime() : 0);
src/App.tsx:        return dateB - dateA;
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      setAlerts(fetchedAlerts.slice(0, 10));
src/App.tsx:    }, (error) => console.error('Alerts subscription error:', error));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return () => unsubscribe();

src/App.tsx:    start_time: '18:00',

src/App.tsx:      setSchedules(snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as ClassSchedule)));

src/App.tsx:    return () => unsubscribe();
src/App.tsx:  }, [academyId]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async (e?: React.FormEvent | React.MouseEvent) => {

src/App.tsx:    console.log("handleSubmit called");

src/App.tsx:        await addDoc(collection(db, `academies/${academyId}/schedules`), data);
src/App.tsx:      }

src/App.tsx:      setEditingSchedule(null);
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, editingSchedule ? OperationType.UPDATE : OperationType.CREATE, `academies/${academyId}/schedules`);

src/App.tsx:  const handleDelete = async () => {

src/App.tsx:const PhotoCheckIn = ({ academyId, scheduleId, onCheckIn }: { academyId: string, scheduleId: string, onCheckIn: (athlete: Athlete) => void }) => {
src/App.tsx:  const [isCapturing, setIsCapturing] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [athletes, setAthletes] = useState<Athlete[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const fetchAthletes = async () => {
src/App.tsx:      const q = query(collection(db, 'athletes'), where('academy_id', '==', academyId));
src/App.tsx:      const snapshot = await getDocs(q);
src/App.tsx:      setAthletes(snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as Athlete)).filter(a => !!a.profile_photo));
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:    fetchAthletes();
src/App.tsx:  }, [academyId]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleCapture = async (capturedBase64: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    setIsProcessing(true);
src/App.tsx:    setError(null);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      // Try multiple ways to get the API key
src/App.tsx:      const apiKey = process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY || 
src/App.tsx:                     (import.meta as any).env?.VITE_GEMINI_API_KEY ||
src/App.tsx:                     (window as any).GEMINI_API_KEY;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (!apiKey || apiKey === "undefined" || apiKey === "null" || apiKey === "") {
src/App.tsx:        throw new Error("Chave da API Gemini não configurada corretamente no ambiente. Por favor, verifique as configurações do projeto.");
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey });
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const getBase64Data = (base64: string) => {
src/App.tsx:        if (!base64) return null;
src/App.tsx:        const parts = base64.split(',');
src/App.tsx:        return parts.length > 1 ? parts[1] : parts[0];
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const capturedData = getBase64Data(capturedBase64);
src/App.tsx:      if (!capturedData) {
src/App.tsx:        throw new Error("Imagem capturada inválida.");
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Prepare the prompt for Gemini
src/App.tsx:      const prompt = `
src/App.tsx:        Você é um sistema de reconhecimento facial de alta precisão para uma academia de Jiu-Jitsu.
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        ENTRADA:
src/App.tsx:        1. Uma foto tirada agora (primeira imagem).
src/App.tsx:        2. Uma lista de fotos de perfil de atletas cadastrados (imagens subsequentes).
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        TAREFA:
src/App.tsx:        Identifique qual atleta da lista de perfil é a mesma pessoa que aparece na foto tirada agora.
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        REGRAS:
src/App.tsx:        - Responda APENAS o ID do atleta encontrado (ex: "abc123xyz").
src/App.tsx:        - Se houver dúvida ou não encontrar ninguém, responda exatamente "NOT_FOUND".
src/App.tsx:        - Não forneça explicações ou textos adicionais.
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        LISTA DE ATLETAS CADASTRADOS:
src/App.tsx:        ${athletes.slice(0, 30).map(a => `ID: ${a.id}, Nome: ${a.name}`).join('\n')}
src/App.tsx:      `;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Limit to 30 athletes to be safer with payload size
src/App.tsx:      const selectedAthletes = athletes.slice(0, 30);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const imageParts = [
src/App.tsx:        {
src/App.tsx:          inlineData: {
src/App.tsx:            mimeType: "image/jpeg",
src/App.tsx:            data: capturedData,
src/App.tsx:          },
src/App.tsx:        },
src/App.tsx:        ...selectedAthletes.map(a => {
src/App.tsx:          const data = getBase64Data(a.profile_photo || '');
src/App.tsx:          return data ? {
src/App.tsx:            inlineData: {
src/App.tsx:              mimeType: "image/jpeg",
src/App.tsx:              data: data,
src/App.tsx:            },
src/App.tsx:          } : null;
src/App.tsx:        }).filter(p => p !== null) as any[]
src/App.tsx:      ];
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      let response;
src/App.tsx:      let retries = 3;
src/App.tsx:      while (retries > 0) {
src/App.tsx:        try {
src/App.tsx:          response = await ai.models.generateContent({
src/App.tsx:            model: "gemini-3-flash-preview",
src/App.tsx:            contents: [{ parts: [{ text: prompt }, ...imageParts] }],
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:          break; // Success
src/App.tsx:        } catch (error: any) {
src/App.tsx:          if (error?.status === 'RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED' || error?.message?.includes('429')) {
src/App.tsx:            retries--;
src/App.tsx:            if (retries === 0) throw error;
src/App.tsx:            console.warn(`Rate limit hit. Retrying in ${Math.pow(2, 3 - retries) * 2000}ms...`);
src/App.tsx:            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, Math.pow(2, 3 - retries) * 2000));
src/App.tsx:          } else {
src/App.tsx:            throw error;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const identifiedId = response?.text?.trim().replace(/['"]/g, '');
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (identifiedId && identifiedId !== "NOT_FOUND") {
src/App.tsx:        const athlete = athletes.find(a => a.id === identifiedId);
src/App.tsx:        if (athlete) {
src/App.tsx:          // Perform check-in
src/App.tsx:          await addDoc(collection(db, 'checkins'), {
src/App.tsx:            academy_id: academyId,
src/App.tsx:            athlete_id: athlete.user_id || athlete.id,
src/App.tsx:            athlete_name: athlete.name,
src/App.tsx:            schedule_id: scheduleId,
src/App.tsx:            date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
src/App.tsx:            status: 'confirmed',
src/App.tsx:            checkin_time: Timestamp.now(),
src/App.tsx:            confirmed_at: Timestamp.now(),
src/App.tsx:            method: 'facial_recognition'
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:          onCheckIn(athlete);
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          setError("Atleta identificado (" + identifiedId + ") mas não encontrado na lista local.");
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        setError("Não foi possível identificar o atleta. Tente novamente ou faça o check-in manual.");
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Erro no reconhecimento facial:", err);
src/App.tsx:      let msg = err.message || 'Erro desconhecido';
src/App.tsx:      if (msg.includes('API key not valid')) {
src/App.tsx:        msg = "A chave da API Gemini é inválida ou expirou. Por favor, contate o suporte ou verifique as variáveis de ambiente.";
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      setError(`Erro: ${msg}`);
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setIsProcessing(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="space-y-6">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="bg-zinc-800/50 p-6 rounded-3xl border border-zinc-700/50 text-center">
src/App.tsx:        <h4 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-2">Check-in por Reconhecimento Facial</h4>
src/App.tsx:        <p className="text-zinc-500 text-sm mb-6">Posicione o atleta em frente à câmera para confirmar a presença automaticamente.</p>
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        {isProcessing ? (
src/App.tsx:          <div className="py-12 flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
src/App.tsx:            <div className="w-12 h-12 border-4 border-emerald-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin" />
src/App.tsx:            <p className="text-emerald-500 font-bold animate-pulse">Identificando Atleta...</p>
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:        ) : (
src/App.tsx:          <CameraCapture onCapture={handleCapture} />
src/App.tsx:        )}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        {error && (
src/App.tsx:          <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/20 rounded-xl text-red-500 text-sm flex items-center gap-2 justify-center">
src/App.tsx:            <AlertCircle size={16} />
src/App.tsx:            {error}
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:        )}
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      <div className="flex justify-center">
src/App.tsx:        <p className="text-[10px] text-zinc-600 uppercase font-bold tracking-widest">
src/App.tsx:          {athletes.length} atletas com foto cadastrada nesta unidade
src/App.tsx:        </p>
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:    </div>
src/App.tsx:  );
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const CheckInSystem = ({ user, currentRole, academies }: { user: User | null, currentRole: string, academies: Academy[] }) => {
src/App.tsx:  const [resolvedAcademyId, setResolvedAcademyId] = useState<string | undefined>(user?.academy_id);
src/App.tsx:  const [schedules, setSchedules] = useState<ClassSchedule[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:  const [checkins, setCheckins] = useState<CheckIn[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:  const [selectedSchedule, setSelectedSchedule] = useState<ClassSchedule | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [showPhotoCheckIn, setShowPhotoCheckIn] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const today = new Date();
src/App.tsx:  const todayStr = today.toISOString().split('T')[0];
src/App.tsx:  const dayOfWeek = today.getDay();
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (user?.academy_id) {
src/App.tsx:      setResolvedAcademyId(user.academy_id);
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (user && (user.role === 'athlete' || user.role === 'professor')) {
src/App.tsx:      const q = query(collection(db, 'athletes'), where('user_id', '==', user.id), limit(1));
src/App.tsx:      getDocs(q).then(snapshot => {
src/App.tsx:        if (!snapshot.empty) {
src/App.tsx:          const athleteData = snapshot.docs[0].data();
src/App.tsx:          setResolvedAcademyId(athleteData.academy_id);
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }, [user]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!resolvedAcademyId) return;
src/App.tsx:    const q = query(collection(db, `academies/${resolvedAcademyId}/schedules`), where('day_of_week', '==', dayOfWeek), orderBy('start_time'));
src/App.tsx:    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
src/App.tsx:      setSchedules(snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as ClassSchedule)));
src/App.tsx:    }, (error) => handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.LIST, `academies/${resolvedAcademyId}/schedules`));
src/App.tsx:    return () => unsubscribe();
src/App.tsx:  }, [resolvedAcademyId, dayOfWeek]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!resolvedAcademyId) return;
src/App.tsx:    const q = query(collection(db, 'checkins'), where('date', '==', todayStr));
src/App.tsx:    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
src/App.tsx:      setCheckins(snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as CheckIn)));
src/App.tsx:    }, (error) => handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.LIST, 'checkins'));
src/App.tsx:    return () => unsubscribe();
src/App.tsx:  }, [resolvedAcademyId, todayStr]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleCheckIn = async (scheduleId: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!user || !resolvedAcademyId) return;
src/App.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'checkins'), {
src/App.tsx:        academy_id: resolvedAcademyId,
src/App.tsx:        athlete_id: user.id,
src/App.tsx:        athlete_name: user.name,
src/App.tsx:        schedule_id: scheduleId,
src/App.tsx:        date: todayStr,
src/App.tsx:        status: 'pending',
src/App.tsx:        checkin_time: Timestamp.now()
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.CREATE, 'checkins');
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const confirmCheckIn = async (checkinId: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'checkins', checkinId), {
src/App.tsx:        status: 'confirmed',
src/App.tsx:        confirmed_at: Timestamp.now(),
src/App.tsx:        confirmed_by: user?.id
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.UPDATE, `checkins/${checkinId}`);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const isAthlete = currentRole === 'athlete';

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  if (!resolvedAcademyId) {

src/App.tsx:          <Landmark size={32} className="text-zinc-700" />
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:        <div className="text-center">
src/App.tsx:          <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-tight">Academia não vinculada</h3>

src/App.tsx:            Você precisa estar vinculado a uma academia para realizar check-in nas aulas.
src/App.tsx:          </p>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:    );
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="space-y-8">
src/App.tsx:      <div>
src/App.tsx:        <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-white tracking-tight uppercase">Check-in de Aulas</h2>
src/App.tsx:        <p className="text-zinc-500 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest">Aulas de hoje: {today.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR', { weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'long' })}</p>
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
src/App.tsx:        <div className="space-y-4">
src/App.tsx:          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
src/App.tsx:            <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-2">
src/App.tsx:              <Clock size={16} className="text-emerald-500" />
src/App.tsx:              Próximas Aulas
src/App.tsx:            </h3>
src/App.tsx:            {isStaff && (
src/App.tsx:              <button 
src/App.tsx:                onClick={() => setShowPhotoCheckIn(true)}
src/App.tsx:                className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-emerald-500/10 hover:bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-500 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all border border-emerald-500/20"
src/App.tsx:              >
src/App.tsx:                <Camera size={14} />
src/App.tsx:                Check-in por Foto
src/App.tsx:              </button>

src/App.tsx:// --- Mock Geocoder for Brazilian Cities ---
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const cityCoords: { [key: string]: [number, number] } = {
src/App.tsx:  'SÃO PAULO': [-23.5505, -46.6333],
src/App.tsx:  'RIO DE JANEIRO': [-22.9068, -43.1729],

src/App.tsx:  'MANAUS': [-3.1190, -60.0217],
src/App.tsx:  'RECIFE': [-8.0543, -34.8813],
src/App.tsx:  'SÃO JOSÉ DA BARRA': [-20.7231, -46.3114],
src/App.tsx:  'PASSOS': [-20.7189, -46.6097],
src/App.tsx:  'CAPITÓLIO': [-20.6751, -46.2903],
src/App.tsx:  'RIBEIRÃO PRETO': [-21.1704, -47.8103],
src/App.tsx:  'CAMPINAS': [-22.9099, -47.0626]
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const getFallbackCoords = (location: string): [number, number] | null => {
src/App.tsx:  if (!location) return null;
src/App.tsx:  const normalize = (str: string) => 
src/App.tsx:    str.toUpperCase()
src/App.tsx:       .normalize("NFD")
src/App.tsx:       .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "");
src/App.tsx:  const upperLoc = normalize(location);
src/App.tsx:  for (const city in cityCoords) {
src/App.tsx:    if (upperLoc.includes(normalize(city))) return cityCoords[city];
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:  if (upperLoc.includes('BRASIL') || upperLoc.includes('BRAZIL') || upperLoc.includes('MG') || upperLoc.includes('SP') || upperLoc.includes('MINAS') || upperLoc.includes('SAO PAULO')) {
src/App.tsx:    return [-14.2350, -51.9253];
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:  return null;
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const MapView = ({ athletes, academies }: { athletes: Athlete[], academies: Academy[] }) => {
src/App.tsx:  const [geoData, setGeoData] = useState<any>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [hoverPos, setHoverPos] = useState<{ x: number, y: number, lat: number, lng: number } | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [zoom, setZoom] = useState({ k: 1, center: [0, 0] as [number, number] });
src/App.tsx:  const [selectedCountry, setSelectedCountry] = useState<any>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const svgRef = useRef<SVGSVGElement>(null);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    fetch('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/world-atlas@2/countries-110m.json')
src/App.tsx:      .then(res => res.json())
src/App.tsx:      .then(data => {
src/App.tsx:        const countries = topojson.feature(data, data.objects.countries);
src/App.tsx:        setGeoData(countries);
src/App.tsx:      })
src/App.tsx:      .catch(err => console.error('Error loading map data:', err));
src/App.tsx:  }, []);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const projection = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    return d3.geoEquirectangular()
src/App.tsx:      .scale(160 * zoom.k)
src/App.tsx:      .center(zoom.center)
src/App.tsx:      .translate([500, 250]);
src/App.tsx:  }, [zoom]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const pathGenerator = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    return d3.geoPath().projection(projection);
src/App.tsx:  }, [projection]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleCountryClick = (feature: any) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (selectedCountry?.id === feature.id) {
src/App.tsx:      setZoom({ k: 1, center: [0, 0] });
src/App.tsx:      setSelectedCountry(null);
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      const centroid = d3.geoCentroid(feature);
src/App.tsx:      setZoom({ k: 4, center: centroid });
src/App.tsx:      setSelectedCountry(feature);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleMouseMove = (e: React.MouseEvent<SVGSVGElement>) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!svgRef.current) return;
src/App.tsx:    const rect = svgRef.current.getBoundingClientRect();
src/App.tsx:    const x = ((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 1000;
src/App.tsx:    const y = ((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 500;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const coords = projection.invert?.([x, y]);
src/App.tsx:    if (coords) {
src/App.tsx:      setHoverPos({ x, y, lng: coords[0], lat: coords[1] });
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const cityStats = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const stats: Record<string, { athletes: number, academies: number }> = {};
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // First, map academies to their cities for quick lookup
src/App.tsx:    const academyCityMap: Record<string, string> = {};
src/App.tsx:    academies.forEach(a => {
src/App.tsx:      const city = a.location.split(',')[0].trim().toUpperCase();
src/App.tsx:      academyCityMap[a.id] = city;
src/App.tsx:      if (!stats[city]) stats[city] = { athletes: 0, academies: 0 };
src/App.tsx:      stats[city].academies++;
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Count athletes
src/App.tsx:    athletes.forEach(a => {
src/App.tsx:      let city = '';
src/App.tsx:      if (a.location?.city) {
src/App.tsx:        city = a.location.city.trim().toUpperCase();
src/App.tsx:      } else if (a.academy_id && academyCityMap[a.academy_id]) {
src/App.tsx:        city = academyCityMap[a.academy_id];
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (city) {
src/App.tsx:        if (!stats[city]) stats[city] = { athletes: 0, academies: 0 };
src/App.tsx:        stats[city].athletes++;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return Object.entries(stats).sort((a, b) => (b[1].athletes + b[1].academies) - (a[1].athletes + a[1].academies));
src/App.tsx:  }, [athletes, academies]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="space-y-8">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
src/App.tsx:        <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-white tracking-tight flex items-center gap-3">
src/App.tsx:          <Globe className="w-8 h-8 text-emerald-500" />
src/App.tsx:          MAPA GLOBAL PAC
src/App.tsx:        </h2>
src/App.tsx:        {selectedCountry && (
src/App.tsx:          <button 
src/App.tsx:            onClick={() => { setZoom({ k: 1, center: [0, 0] }); setSelectedCountry(null); }}
src/App.tsx:            className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all border border-zinc-700"
src/App.tsx:          >
src/App.tsx:            <RefreshCw size={14} className="text-emerald-500" />
src/App.tsx:            RESETAR ZOOM MUNDIAL
src/App.tsx:          </button>
src/App.tsx:        )}
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
src/App.tsx:        <div className="lg:col-span-2 bg-zinc-900 rounded-3xl p-4 shadow-2xl border border-zinc-800 relative overflow-hidden min-h-[500px] flex items-center justify-center">
src/App.tsx:          {/* Detailed World Map SVG */}
src/App.tsx:          <div className="absolute inset-0 opacity-100 p-12 flex items-center justify-center">
src/App.tsx:            <svg 
src/App.tsx:              ref={svgRef}
src/App.tsx:              viewBox="0 0 1000 500" 
src/App.tsx:              className="w-full h-full max-w-5xl cursor-crosshair overflow-visible"
src/App.tsx:              onMouseMove={handleMouseMove}
src/App.tsx:              onMouseLeave={() => setHoverPos(null)}
src/App.tsx:            >
src/App.tsx:              <defs>
src/App.tsx:                <filter id="worldGlow">
src/App.tsx:                  <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2" result="blur"/>
src/App.tsx:                  <feComposite in="SourceGraphic" in2="blur" operator="over"/>
src/App.tsx:                </filter>
src/App.tsx:                <pattern id="dotPattern" x="0" y="0" width="10" height="10" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
src/App.tsx:                  <circle cx="1" cy="1" r="1" className="fill-white/20" />
src/App.tsx:                </pattern>
src/App.tsx:                <filter id="markerGlow">
src/App.tsx:                  <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blur"/>
src/App.tsx:                  <feFlood floodColor="currentColor" result="color"/>
src/App.tsx:                  <feComposite in="color" in2="blur" operator="in" result="glow"/>
src/App.tsx:                  <feComposite in="SourceGraphic" in2="glow" operator="over"/>
src/App.tsx:                </filter>
src/App.tsx:              </defs>
src/App.tsx:              
src/App.tsx:              {/* Grid Lines */}
src/App.tsx:              <g className="stroke-white/5 stroke-[0.5]">
src/App.tsx:                {[...Array(21)].map((_, i) => (
src/App.tsx:                  <line key={`v-${i}`} x1={i * 50} y1="0" x2={i * 50} y2="500" />
src/App.tsx:                ))}
src/App.tsx:                {[...Array(11)].map((_, i) => (
src/App.tsx:                  <line key={`h-${i}`} x1="0" y1={i * 50} x2="1000" y2={i * 50} />
src/App.tsx:                ))}
src/App.tsx:              </g>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:              {/* World Map Paths */}
src/App.tsx:              {geoData && (
src/App.tsx:                <g className="fill-white/5 stroke-white/20 stroke-[1]" filter="url(#worldGlow)">
src/App.tsx:                  {geoData.features.map((feature: any, i: number) => (
src/App.tsx:                    <path
src/App.tsx:                      key={`country-${i}`}
src/App.tsx:                      d={pathGenerator(feature) || ''}
src/App.tsx:                      onClick={() => handleCountryClick(feature)}
src/App.tsx:                      className={cn(
src/App.tsx:                        "transition-all duration-500 cursor-pointer",
src/App.tsx:                        selectedCountry?.id === feature.id ? "fill-emerald-500/20 stroke-emerald-500/50" : "hover:fill-white/10"

src/App.tsx:                  ))}
src/App.tsx:                </g>
src/App.tsx:              )}
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:              <rect x="0" y="0" width="1000" height="500" fill="url(#dotPattern)" pointerEvents="none" />
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:              {/* Connection Lines (Athlete to Academy) */}
src/App.tsx:              <g className="pointer-events-none">
src/App.tsx:                {athletes.filter(a => a.academy_id && a.location?.lat).map(athlete => {
src/App.tsx:                  const academy = academies.find(ac => ac.id === athlete.academy_id);
src/App.tsx:                  if (!academy || !academy.lat) return null;
src/App.tsx:                  
src/App.tsx:                  const start = projection([athlete.location?.lng || 0, athlete.location?.lat || 0]);
src/App.tsx:                  const end = projection([academy.lng || 0, academy.lat || 0]);
src/App.tsx:                  
src/App.tsx:                  if (!start || !end) return null;
src/App.tsx:                  
src/App.tsx:                  return (
src/App.tsx:                    <motion.line
src/App.tsx:                      key={`link-${athlete.id}-${academy.id}`}
src/App.tsx:                      initial={{ pathLength: 0, opacity: 0 }}
src/App.tsx:                      animate={{ pathLength: 1, opacity: 0.15 }}
src/App.tsx:                      transition={{ duration: 2, delay: 1 }}
src/App.tsx:                      x1={start[0]} y1={start[1]}
src/App.tsx:                      x2={end[0]} y2={end[1]}
src/App.tsx:                      stroke="white"
src/App.tsx:                      strokeWidth="0.5"
src/App.tsx:                      strokeDasharray="2 2"
src/App.tsx:                    />
src/App.tsx:                  );
src/App.tsx:                })}
src/App.tsx:              </g>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:              {/* Academy Markers (Inside SVG for perfect alignment) */}
src/App.tsx:              <g className="academies-layer" style={{ isolation: 'isolate' }}>
src/App.tsx:                {academies.map((academy) => {
src/App.tsx:                  // Extremely permissive coordinate detection
src/App.tsx:                  let rawLat = academy.lat ?? (academy as any).latitude ?? (academy as any).location?.lat;
src/App.tsx:                  let rawLng = academy.lng ?? (academy as any).longitude ?? (academy as any).lon ?? (academy as any).location?.lng;
src/App.tsx:                  
src/App.tsx:                  let lat = Number(rawLat);
src/App.tsx:                  let lng = Number(rawLng);
src/App.tsx:                  
src/App.tsx:                  // Fallback to Mock Geocoder if coordinates are missing or zero
src/App.tsx:                  if (isNaN(lat) || isNaN(lng) || lat === 0) {
src/App.tsx:                    const fallback = getFallbackCoords(academy.location);
src/App.tsx:                    if (fallback) {
src/App.tsx:                      lat = fallback[0];
src/App.tsx:                      lng = fallback[1];
src/App.tsx:                      // Debug log to help identify if fallback is working
src/App.tsx:                      console.log(`Fallback applied for ${academy.name}: ${lat}, ${lng}`);
src/App.tsx:                    }
src/App.tsx:                  }
src/App.tsx:                  
src/App.tsx:                  if (isNaN(lat) || isNaN(lng) || lat === 0) return null;
src/App.tsx:                  
src/App.tsx:                  const pos = projection([lng, lat]);

src/App.tsx:                        }

src/App.tsx:                        lat = aLat + ((seed % 100) / 200) - 0.25;
src/App.tsx:                        lng = aLng + (((seed * 13) % 100) / 200) - 0.25;
src/App.tsx:                      }
src/App.tsx:                    }
src/App.tsx:                  }

src/App.tsx:                  if (isNaN(lat) || isNaN(lng) || lat === 0) return null;

src/App.tsx:                  if (!pos || isNaN(pos[0]) || isNaN(pos[1])) return null;

src/App.tsx:const AIBatchTechniqueGenerator = ({ existingTechniques, onComplete }: { existingTechniques: Technique[], onComplete: () => void }) => {
src/App.tsx:  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [step, setStep] = useState<'config' | 'suggest' | 'generate'>('config');
src/App.tsx:  const [suggestions, setSuggestions] = useState<{ name: string, description: string }[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:  const [selectedSuggestions, setSelectedSuggestions] = useState<string[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [progress, setProgress] = useState({ current: 0, total: 0 });
src/App.tsx:  const [focusBelt, setFocusBelt] = useState<string>('');
src/App.tsx:  const [focusCategory, setFocusCategory] = useState<string>('');
src/App.tsx:  const [suggestionCount, setSuggestionCount] = useState<number>(5);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const getSuggestions = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/App.tsx:    setStep('suggest');
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey: process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY || '' });
src/App.tsx:      const existingNames = existingTechniques.map(t => t.name).join(', ');
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      let response;
src/App.tsx:      let retries = 3;
src/App.tsx:      while (retries > 0) {
src/App.tsx:        try {
src/App.tsx:          response = await ai.models.generateContent({
src/App.tsx:            model: "gemini-3-flash-preview",
src/App.tsx:            contents: `Você é um mestre de Jiu-Jitsu Brasileiro (BJJ) encarregado de expandir uma biblioteca técnica de elite.
src/App.tsx:            
src/App.tsx:            Atualmente, a biblioteca possui as seguintes técnicas: [${existingNames}]
src/App.tsx:            
src/App.tsx:            Sua tarefa é analisar o que está faltando para um currículo completo (desde iniciante até avançado) e sugerir ${suggestionCount} novas técnicas que complementariam bem o acervo atual.
src/App.tsx:            NÃO sugira técnicas que já existam na lista acima.
src/App.tsx:            
src/App.tsx:            ${focusBelt ? `Foque em sugerir técnicas para a faixa: ${focusBelt}.` : ''}
src/App.tsx:            ${focusCategory ? `Foque em sugerir técnicas da categoria/fundamento: ${focusCategory}.` : ''}
src/App.tsx:            
src/App.tsx:            Considere:
src/App.tsx:            - Equilíbrio entre Quedas, Guardas, Passagens, Raspagens e Finalizações.
src/App.tsx:            - Progressão pedagógica.

src/App.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      // Deep migration helper to scan all strings for base64
src/App.tsx:      const deepMigrate = async (obj: any): Promise<any> => {
src/App.tsx:        if (typeof obj === 'string') {
src/App.tsx:          if (obj.startsWith('data:')) {
src/App.tsx:            try {
src/App.tsx:              const response = await fetch(obj);
src/App.tsx:              const blob = await response.blob();
src/App.tsx:              const type = blob.type.split('/')[0] || 'media';
src/App.tsx:              const ext = blob.type.split('/')[1] || 'bin';
src/App.tsx:              const storageRef = ref(storage, `techniques/${type}/${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}.${ext}`);
src/App.tsx:              await uploadBytes(storageRef, blob);
src/App.tsx:              return await getDownloadURL(storageRef);
src/App.tsx:            } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:              console.error("Erro na migração de base64:", err);
src/App.tsx:              return obj; // Fallback to original
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:          return obj;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        if (Array.isArray(obj)) {
src/App.tsx:          return Promise.all(obj.map(item => deepMigrate(item)));
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        if (typeof obj === 'object' && obj !== null) {
src/App.tsx:          const newObj: any = {};
src/App.tsx:          for (const key in obj) {
src/App.tsx:            newObj[key] = await deepMigrate(obj[key]);
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:          return newObj;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        return obj;
src/App.tsx:      };

src/App.tsx:      };

src/App.tsx:      // Final size validation - Firestore limit is 1,048,576 bytes

src/App.tsx:const SubmissionForm = ({ technique, user, onSuccess }: { technique: Technique, user: User, onSuccess: () => void }) => {

src/App.tsx:  const [videoUrl, setVideoUrl] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/App.tsx:    setLoading(true);

src/App.tsx:      });

src/App.tsx:      const progressId = `${user.id}_${technique.id}`;

src/App.tsx:        status: 'submitted',
src/App.tsx:        last_updated: new Date().toISOString()
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      onSuccess();
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Error submitting video:", error);
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (

src/App.tsx:      >

src/App.tsx:const SubmissionsList = ({ user }: { user: User | null }) => {
src/App.tsx:  const [submissions, setSubmissions] = useState<TechniqueSubmission[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
src/App.tsx:  const [evaluatingId, setEvaluatingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [feedback, setFeedback] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const q = query(collection(db, 'technique_submissions'), where('status', '==', 'pending'), orderBy('submitted_at', 'desc'));
src/App.tsx:    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
src/App.tsx:      setSubmissions(snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as TechniqueSubmission)));
src/App.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    return unsubscribe;
src/App.tsx:  }, []);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleEvaluate = async (submission: TechniqueSubmission, status: 'validated' | 'rejected') => {
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'technique_submissions', submission.id), {
src/App.tsx:        status,
src/App.tsx:        feedback,
src/App.tsx:        evaluated_by: user?.id,
src/App.tsx:        evaluated_at: new Date().toISOString()
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const progressId = `${submission.athlete_id}_${submission.technique_id}`;
src/App.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'student_technique_progress', progressId), {
src/App.tsx:        status,
src/App.tsx:        last_updated: new Date().toISOString()
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      setEvaluatingId(null);
src/App.tsx:      setFeedback('');

src/App.tsx:  const fixLibrary = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    setFixing(true);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const deepMigrate = async (obj: any): Promise<any> => {
src/App.tsx:        if (typeof obj === 'string') {
src/App.tsx:          if (obj.startsWith('data:')) {
src/App.tsx:            const response = await fetch(obj);
src/App.tsx:            const blob = await response.blob();
src/App.tsx:            const type = blob.type.split('/')[0] || 'media';
src/App.tsx:            const ext = blob.type.split('/')[1] || 'bin';
src/App.tsx:            const storageRef = ref(storage, `techniques/${type}/${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}.${ext}`);
src/App.tsx:            await uploadBytes(storageRef, blob);
src/App.tsx:            return await getDownloadURL(storageRef);
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:          return obj;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        if (Array.isArray(obj)) return Promise.all(obj.map(item => deepMigrate(item)));
src/App.tsx:        if (typeof obj === 'object' && obj !== null) {
src/App.tsx:          const newObj: any = {};
src/App.tsx:          for (const key in obj) newObj[key] = await deepMigrate(obj[key]);
src/App.tsx:          return newObj;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        return obj;
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      let fixedCount = 0;
src/App.tsx:      for (const tech of techniques) {
src/App.tsx:        const jsonStr = JSON.stringify(tech);
src/App.tsx:        if (jsonStr.includes('data:')) {
src/App.tsx:          const migrated = await deepMigrate(tech);
src/App.tsx:          await updateDoc(doc(db, 'techniques', tech.id), migrated);
src/App.tsx:          fixedCount++;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      alert(`${fixedCount} técnicas foram corrigidas e migradas para o Storage.`);

src/App.tsx:          break; // Success
src/App.tsx:        } catch (error: any) {
src/App.tsx:          if (error?.status === 'RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED' || error?.message?.includes('429')) {
src/App.tsx:            retries--;
src/App.tsx:            if (retries === 0) throw error;
src/App.tsx:            const delay = Math.pow(2, 3 - retries) * 5000; // 5s, 10s, 20s
src/App.tsx:            console.warn(`Rate limit hit. Retrying in ${delay}ms...`);
src/App.tsx:            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, delay));
src/App.tsx:          } else {
src/App.tsx:            throw error;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const result = JSON.parse(response?.text || '{}');
src/App.tsx:      setReport(result);
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Erro na auditoria:", error);
src/App.tsx:      alert("Erro ao realizar auditoria.");
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setLoading(false);

src/App.tsx:const SearchableAthleteSelect = ({ 
src/App.tsx:  athletes, 
src/App.tsx:  selectedId, 
src/App.tsx:  onSelect, 
src/App.tsx:  label = "Selecionar Atleta" 
src/App.tsx:}: { 
src/App.tsx:  athletes: any[], 
src/App.tsx:  selectedId: string, 
src/App.tsx:  onSelect: (id: string, name: string) => void,
src/App.tsx:  label?: string
src/App.tsx:}) => {
src/App.tsx:  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const selectedAthlete = athletes.find(a => a.id === selectedId);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const handleClickOutside = (event: MouseEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:      if (containerRef.current && !containerRef.current.contains(event.target as Node)) {
src/App.tsx:        setIsOpen(false);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
src/App.tsx:    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
src/App.tsx:  }, []);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const filteredAthletes = athletes.filter(a => 
src/App.tsx:    a.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())
src/App.tsx:  );
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="space-y-2 relative" ref={containerRef}>
src/App.tsx:      <label className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 uppercase font-bold tracking-widest">{label}</label>
src/App.tsx:      <div 
src/App.tsx:        onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
src/App.tsx:        className="w-full bg-zinc-800 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-white text-sm flex items-center justify-between cursor-pointer hover:border-zinc-600 transition-all"

src/App.tsx:        <span className={selectedAthlete ? "text-white" : "text-zinc-500"}>
src/App.tsx:          {selectedAthlete ? selectedAthlete.name : "Buscar atleta..."}
src/App.tsx:        </span>
src/App.tsx:        <ChevronDown className={cn("w-4 h-4 text-zinc-500 transition-transform", isOpen && "rotate-180")} />
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      <AnimatePresence>
src/App.tsx:        {isOpen && (

src/App.tsx:            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
src/App.tsx:            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
src/App.tsx:            exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}

src/App.tsx:                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}

src/App.tsx:                />
src/App.tsx:              </div>

src/App.tsx:              {filteredAthletes.length > 0 ? (
src/App.tsx:                filteredAthletes.map(athlete => (
src/App.tsx:                  <button
src/App.tsx:                    type="button"

src/App.tsx:                      setIsOpen(false);
src/App.tsx:                      setSearchTerm('');

src/App.tsx:        // Barra (Elite 16+)
src/App.tsx:        if (formData.pull_ups >= 16) points += 20;
src/App.tsx:        else if (formData.pull_ups >= 11) points += 15;
src/App.tsx:        else if (formData.pull_ups >= 6) points += 10;
src/App.tsx:        else points += 5;
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:        if (formData.push_ups >= 70) points += 20;
src/App.tsx:        else if (formData.push_ups >= 50) points += 15;
src/App.tsx:        else if (formData.push_ups >= 35) points += 10;
src/App.tsx:        else points += 5;

src/App.tsx:        // Grip (Elite 120s+)
src/App.tsx:        if (formData.kimono_grip_seconds >= 120) points += 20;
src/App.tsx:        else if (formData.kimono_grip_seconds >= 90) points += 15;
src/App.tsx:        else if (formData.kimono_grip_seconds >= 60) points += 10;
src/App.tsx:        else points += 5;
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:        else if (formData.sprint_seconds <= 6) points += 15;
src/App.tsx:        else if (formData.sprint_seconds <= 7) points += 10;

src/App.tsx:        else if (formData.burpees >= 50) points += 15;
src/App.tsx:        else if (formData.burpees >= 35) points += 10;

src/App.tsx:        else if (formData.abdominals >= 40) points += 15;
src/App.tsx:        else if (formData.abdominals >= 30) points += 10;
src/App.tsx:        else points += 5;
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:        latest_physical_power: totalScore,
src/App.tsx:        latest_weight: formData.weight
src/App.tsx:      } : null;

src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:        ...formData,
src/App.tsx:        total_score: totalScore,
src/App.tsx:        date: editingMetric ? editingMetric.date : new Date().toISOString(),
src/App.tsx:      };

src/App.tsx:const createAutomaticPost = async (academyId: string, athleteId: string, athleteName: string, content: string, metadata?: any) => {
src/App.tsx:  try {
src/App.tsx:    await addDoc(collection(db, 'posts'), {
src/App.tsx:      academy_id: academyId,
src/App.tsx:      athlete_id: athleteId,
src/App.tsx:      athlete_name: athleteName,
src/App.tsx:      content,
src/App.tsx:      type: 'automatic',
src/App.tsx:      likes_count: 0,
src/App.tsx:      comments_count: 0,
src/App.tsx:      created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
src/App.tsx:      metadata
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:  } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:    console.error('Error creating automatic post:', error);
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const PerformanceAIView = ({ athletes }: { athletes: Athlete[] }) => {
src/App.tsx:  const aiInsights = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    return athletes.map(a => {
src/App.tsx:      const consistency = (a.training_count_30d || 0) / 12;
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // PAC Readiness: Psych (40%) + Sleep (30%) + HRV (30%)
src/App.tsx:      const psychNorm = (a.latest_psych_score || 100) / 200;
src/App.tsx:      const sleepNorm = (a.sleep_telemetry?.deep_sleep_pct || 75) / 100;
src/App.tsx:      const hrvNorm = Math.min(1, (a.biometrics?.hrv || 60) / 100);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const readiness = (psychNorm * 0.4) + (sleepNorm * 0.3) + (hrvNorm * 0.3);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const performance = a.score / 500;
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const injuryRisk = (consistency > 1.3 && readiness < 0.5) ? 'Alto' : (consistency > 1.1 || readiness < 0.6) ? 'Médio' : 'Baixo';
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      let prediction = 'Evolução constante';
src/App.tsx:      if (performance > 0.85 && readiness > 0.8) prediction = 'Pico de Performance / Favorito ao Ouro';
src/App.tsx:      else if (performance > 0.7) prediction = 'Alta probabilidade de pódio';
src/App.tsx:      else if (readiness < 0.4) prediction = 'Necessita de Descanso / Recuperação';
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      return {
src/App.tsx:        name: a.name,
src/App.tsx:        consistency: (consistency * 100).toFixed(0) + '%',
src/App.tsx:        performance: (performance * 100).toFixed(0) + '%',
src/App.tsx:        readiness: (readiness * 100).toFixed(0) + '%',
src/App.tsx:        injuryRisk,
src/App.tsx:        prediction
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:  }, [athletes]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="space-y-8">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
src/App.tsx:        <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-white tracking-tight flex items-center gap-3">
src/App.tsx:          <Brain className="w-8 h-8 text-emerald-500" />
src/App.tsx:          PAC AI INSIGHTS
src/App.tsx:        </h2>
src/App.tsx:        <div className="bg-emerald-500/10 border border-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-500 text-[10px] font-black px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full uppercase tracking-[0.2em]">
src/App.tsx:          Motor de Predição Ativo
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
src/App.tsx:        <div className="bg-zinc-900 p-8 rounded-3xl border border-zinc-800 shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden group">
src/App.tsx:          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 p-4 opacity-5 group-hover:opacity-10 transition-opacity">
src/App.tsx:            <Target size={80} className="text-emerald-500" />
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:          <div className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 uppercase font-black tracking-widest mb-2">Precisão do Modelo</div>
src/App.tsx:          <div className="text-4xl font-black text-white tracking-tighter">94.2%</div>
src/App.tsx:          <div className="text-[10px] text-emerald-500 font-bold mt-4 flex items-center gap-1">
src/App.tsx:            <TrendingUp size={12} /> +1.2% vs mês anterior
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:        <div className="bg-zinc-900 p-8 rounded-3xl border border-zinc-800 shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden group">
src/App.tsx:          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 p-4 opacity-5 group-hover:opacity-10 transition-opacity">
src/App.tsx:            <Activity size={80} className="text-rose-500" />
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:          <div className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 uppercase font-black tracking-widest mb-2">Atletas em Risco</div>
src/App.tsx:          <div className="text-4xl font-black text-rose-500 tracking-tighter">{aiInsights.filter(i => i.injuryRisk === 'Alto').length}</div>
src/App.tsx:          <div className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 font-bold mt-4">Baseado em carga de treino</div>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:        <div className="bg-zinc-900 p-8 rounded-3xl border border-zinc-800 shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden group">
src/App.tsx:          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 p-4 opacity-5 group-hover:opacity-10 transition-opacity">
src/App.tsx:            <Trophy size={80} className="text-amber-500" />
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:          <div className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 uppercase font-black tracking-widest mb-2">Projeção de Medalhas</div>
src/App.tsx:          <div className="text-4xl font-black text-amber-500 tracking-tighter">{aiInsights.filter(i => i.prediction.includes('pódio')).length}</div>
src/App.tsx:          <div className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 font-bold mt-4">Próximos 90 dias</div>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      <div className="bg-zinc-900 rounded-3xl border border-zinc-800 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
src/App.tsx:        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
src/App.tsx:          <table className="w-full text-left">
src/App.tsx:            <thead className="bg-zinc-800/50 border-b border-zinc-800">
src/App.tsx:              <tr className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 uppercase font-black tracking-widest">
src/App.tsx:                <th className="px-8 py-5">Atleta</th>
src/App.tsx:                <th className="px-8 py-5">Consistência</th>
src/App.tsx:                <th className="px-8 py-5">Prontidão</th>

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:// --- PAC Meritocracy Algorithm ---
src/App.tsx:const calculatePACScore = (athlete: Athlete) => {
src/App.tsx:  // 1. Technical (Average of Efficiency + Competencies)
src/App.tsx:  const efficiencies = (
src/App.tsx:    (athlete.technical_history?.raspagens_efficiency || 0) +
src/App.tsx:    (athlete.technical_history?.passagens_efficiency || 0) +
src/App.tsx:    (athlete.technical_history?.finalizacoes_efficiency || 0) +
src/App.tsx:    (athlete.technical_history?.quedas_efficiency || 0) +
src/App.tsx:    (athlete.technical_history?.defesa_efficiency || 0)
src/App.tsx:  ) / 5;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const competencies = athlete.technical_competencies 
src/App.tsx:    ? Object.values(athlete.technical_competencies).reduce((a, b) => a + (b || 0), 0) / 8
src/App.tsx:    : efficiencies;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const technical = (efficiencies + competencies) / 2; // Max 100
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // 2. Physical
src/App.tsx:  const physical = athlete.latest_physical_power || 0; // Max 100
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  // 3. Psychological (Normalize 0-200 to 0-100)
src/App.tsx:  const psychological = (athlete.latest_psych_score || 0) / 2; // Max 100
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  // 4. Discipline
src/App.tsx:  const discipline = athlete.latest_discipline_score || 80; // Default to 80 if not yet evaluated
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  // 5. Results (Medals)
src/App.tsx:  const results = (athlete.medals_count?.gold || 0) * 25 + 
src/App.tsx:                  (athlete.medals_count?.silver || 0) * 15 + 
src/App.tsx:                  (athlete.medals_count?.bronze || 0) * 10;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // 6. Meritocracy (Direct points from events)
src/App.tsx:  const merit = athlete.merit_points || 0;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const total = technical + physical + psychological + discipline + results + merit;
src/App.tsx:  const score = Math.min(500, Math.round(total));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  let classification = 'Base PAC';
src/App.tsx:  if (score >= 450) classification = 'Elite PAC';
src/App.tsx:  else if (score >= 350) classification = 'Pro PAC';
src/App.tsx:  else if (score >= 200) classification = 'Aspirante PAC';
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return { score, classification };
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/App.tsx:    if (!formData.athlete_id) {
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:        : doc(collection(db, `athletes/${formData.athlete_id}/competitions`));

src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        batch.set(compRef, evalData);

src/App.tsx:        if (formData.result === 'Bronze') updateData['medals_count.bronze'] = increment(1);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        batch.update(athleteRef, updateData);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      await batch.commit();
src/App.tsx:      onSuccess();
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.WRITE, `athletes/${formData.athlete_id}/competitions`);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:const MealLogForm = ({ athleteId, onSuccess }: { athleteId: string, onSuccess: () => void }) => {
src/App.tsx:  const [isEstimating, setIsEstimating] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
src/App.tsx:    meal_type: 'Café da Manhã' as any,
src/App.tsx:    food_name: '',
src/App.tsx:    amount: '',
src/App.tsx:    calories: 0,
src/App.tsx:    protein: 0,
src/App.tsx:    carbs: 0,
src/App.tsx:    fats: 0
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const estimateMacros = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!formData.food_name) return;
src/App.tsx:    setIsEstimating(true);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey: process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY });
src/App.tsx:      const prompt = `Estime os macronutrientes (calorias, proteínas, carboidratos, gorduras) para a seguinte refeição: "${formData.food_name}". 
src/App.tsx:      Retorne APENAS um objeto JSON com as chaves: calories, protein, carbs, fats. Use números inteiros.`;
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      let response;
src/App.tsx:      let retries = 3;
src/App.tsx:      while (retries > 0) {
src/App.tsx:        try {
src/App.tsx:          response = await ai.models.generateContent({
src/App.tsx:            model: "gemini-3-flash-preview",
src/App.tsx:            contents: prompt,
src/App.tsx:            config: { responseMimeType: "application/json" }
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:          break; // Success
src/App.tsx:        } catch (error: any) {
src/App.tsx:          if (error?.status === 'RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED' || error?.message?.includes('429')) {
src/App.tsx:            retries--;
src/App.tsx:            if (retries === 0) throw error;
src/App.tsx:            console.warn(`Rate limit hit. Retrying in ${Math.pow(2, 3 - retries) * 2000}ms...`);
src/App.tsx:            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, Math.pow(2, 3 - retries) * 2000));
src/App.tsx:          } else {
src/App.tsx:            throw error;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const result = JSON.parse(response?.text || '{}');
src/App.tsx:      setFormData(prev => ({
src/App.tsx:        ...prev,
src/App.tsx:        calories: result.calories || 0,
src/App.tsx:        protein: result.protein || 0,
src/App.tsx:        carbs: result.carbs || 0,
src/App.tsx:        fats: result.fats || 0
src/App.tsx:      }));
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error('Error estimating macros:', error);
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setIsEstimating(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const logData = {
src/App.tsx:        ...formData,
src/App.tsx:        athlete_id: athleteId,
src/App.tsx:        date: new Date().toISOString(),
src/App.tsx:        created_at: Timestamp.now()
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, `athletes/${athleteId}/meal_logs`), logData);
src/App.tsx:      onSuccess();
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.WRITE, `athletes/${athleteId}/meal_logs`);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
src/App.tsx:        <div className="space-y-1">
src/App.tsx:          <label className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 uppercase font-bold">Tipo de Refeição</label>
src/App.tsx:          <select

src/App.tsx:            onChange={e => setFormData({...formData, meal_type: e.target.value as any})}
src/App.tsx:          >
src/App.tsx:            <option value="Café da Manhã">Café da Manhã</option>
src/App.tsx:            <option value="Almoço">Almoço</option>
src/App.tsx:            <option value="Jantar">Jantar</option>

src/App.tsx:          </select>

src/App.tsx:        <div className="space-y-1">

src/App.tsx:          <input 
src/App.tsx:            type="text" 
src/App.tsx:            className="w-full bg-zinc-800 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-white outline-none focus:border-emerald-500"
src/App.tsx:            onChange={e => setFormData({...formData, amount: e.target.value})}
src/App.tsx:            placeholder="Opcional"
src/App.tsx:          />
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:      </div>

src/App.tsx:      <div className="space-y-1">
src/App.tsx:        <label className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 uppercase font-bold">O que você comeu?</label>

src/App.tsx:          <input 
src/App.tsx:            type="text"

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const WaterTracker = ({ athleteId, currentWater, targetWater }: { athleteId: string, currentWater: number, targetWater: number }) => {
src/App.tsx:  const [isAdding, setIsAdding] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const addWater = async (amount: number) => {
src/App.tsx:    setIsAdding(true);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
src/App.tsx:      const logData = {
src/App.tsx:        athlete_id: athleteId,
src/App.tsx:        date: today,
src/App.tsx:        amount_ml: amount,
src/App.tsx:        timestamp: Timestamp.now()
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, `athletes/${athleteId}/water_logs`), logData);
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.WRITE, `athletes/${athleteId}/water_logs`);
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setIsAdding(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const percentage = Math.min(100, (currentWater / targetWater) * 100);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-6 space-y-4">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
src/App.tsx:        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
src/App.tsx:          <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-blue-500/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-blue-500">
src/App.tsx:            <Droplets size={20} />
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:          <div>
src/App.tsx:            <h4 className="font-bold text-white">Hidratação</h4>
src/App.tsx:            <p className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Meta: {targetWater}ml</p>
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:        <div className="text-right">
src/App.tsx:          <div className="text-xl font-black text-white">{currentWater} <span className="text-[10px] font-normal text-zinc-500">ml</span></div>
src/App.tsx:          <div className="text-[10px] font-bold text-blue-500">{percentage.toFixed(0)}% da meta</div>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      <div className="w-full h-3 bg-zinc-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
src/App.tsx:        <motion.div 
src/App.tsx:          initial={{ width: 0 }}
src/App.tsx:          animate={{ width: `${percentage}%` }}
src/App.tsx:          className="h-full bg-blue-500 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]"
src/App.tsx:        />
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
src/App.tsx:        {[250, 500, 1000].map(amount => (
src/App.tsx:          <button 
src/App.tsx:            key={amount}
src/App.tsx:            onClick={() => addWater(amount)}
src/App.tsx:            disabled={isAdding}
src/App.tsx:            className="bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-white text-[10px] font-bold py-2 rounded-lg transition-all border border-white/5"
src/App.tsx:          >
src/App.tsx:            +{amount}ml
src/App.tsx:          </button>
src/App.tsx:        ))}
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:    </div>
src/App.tsx:  );
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const NutritionDiary = ({ athleteId, targetPlan }: { athleteId: string, targetPlan: any }) => {
src/App.tsx:  const [mealLogs, setMealLogs] = useState<MealLog[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:  const [weeklyLogs, setWeeklyLogs] = useState<MealLog[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:  const [waterLogs, setWaterLogs] = useState<WaterLog[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:  const [isMealModalOpen, setIsMealModalOpen] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
src/App.tsx:    const sevenDaysAgo = new Date();
src/App.tsx:    sevenDaysAgo.setDate(sevenDaysAgo.getDate() - 7);
src/App.tsx:    const sevenDaysAgoStr = sevenDaysAgo.toISOString().split('T')[0];
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Fetch meals for today
src/App.tsx:    const mealsQuery = query(
src/App.tsx:      collection(db, `athletes/${athleteId}/meal_logs`),
src/App.tsx:      orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
src/App.tsx:    );
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const unsubscribeMeals = onSnapshot(mealsQuery, (snapshot) => {
src/App.tsx:      const allLogs = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as MealLog));
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const todayLogs = allLogs.filter(log => log.date.startsWith(today));
src/App.tsx:      const lastSevenDaysLogs = allLogs.filter(log => log.date >= sevenDaysAgoStr);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      setMealLogs(todayLogs);
src/App.tsx:      setWeeklyLogs(lastSevenDaysLogs);
src/App.tsx:    }, (error) => {
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.GET, `athletes/${athleteId}/meal_logs`);
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Fetch water for today
src/App.tsx:    const waterQuery = query(
src/App.tsx:      collection(db, `athletes/${athleteId}/water_logs`),
src/App.tsx:      where('date', '==', today)
src/App.tsx:    );
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const unsubscribeWater = onSnapshot(waterQuery, (snapshot) => {
src/App.tsx:      const logs = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as WaterLog));
src/App.tsx:      setWaterLogs(logs);
src/App.tsx:    }, (error) => {
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.GET, `athletes/${athleteId}/water_logs`);
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return () => {
src/App.tsx:      unsubscribeMeals();
src/App.tsx:      unsubscribeWater();
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:  }, [athleteId]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const totals = mealLogs.reduce((acc, curr) => ({
src/App.tsx:    calories: acc.calories + (curr.calories || 0),
src/App.tsx:    protein: acc.protein + (curr.protein || 0),
src/App.tsx:    carbs: acc.carbs + (curr.carbs || 0),
src/App.tsx:    fats: acc.fats + (curr.fats || 0)
src/App.tsx:  }), { calories: 0, protein: 0, carbs: 0, fats: 0 });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const currentWater = waterLogs.reduce((acc, curr) => acc + curr.amount_ml, 0);
src/App.tsx:  const waterTarget = targetPlan?.water_target_ml || 3000;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Process weekly data for chart
src/App.tsx:  const chartData = useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const days: any = {};
src/App.tsx:    const last7Days = Array.from({ length: 7 }, (_, i) => {
src/App.tsx:      const d = new Date();
src/App.tsx:      d.setDate(d.getDate() - (6 - i));
src/App.tsx:      return d.toISOString().split('T')[0];
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    last7Days.forEach(date => {
src/App.tsx:      days[date] = { 
src/App.tsx:        date: date.split('-').slice(1).reverse().join('/'), 
src/App.tsx:        calories: 0, 
src/App.tsx:        protein: 0, 
src/App.tsx:        carbs: 0, 
src/App.tsx:        fats: 0,
src/App.tsx:        target: targetPlan?.tdee || 2500
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    weeklyLogs.forEach(log => {
src/App.tsx:      const date = log.date.split('T')[0];
src/App.tsx:      if (days[date]) {
src/App.tsx:        days[date].calories += log.calories || 0;
src/App.tsx:        days[date].protein += log.protein || 0;
src/App.tsx:        days[date].carbs += log.carbs || 0;
src/App.tsx:        days[date].fats += log.fats || 0;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return Object.values(days);
src/App.tsx:  }, [weeklyLogs]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="space-y-6">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
src/App.tsx:        {/* Progress Section */}
src/App.tsx:        <div className="bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-6 space-y-6">
src/App.tsx:          <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
src/App.tsx:            <h4 className="font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">
src/App.tsx:              <Activity size={18} className="text-emerald-500" />
src/App.tsx:              Consumo Diário
src/App.tsx:            </h4>
src/App.tsx:            <button 
src/App.tsx:              onClick={() => setIsMealModalOpen(true)}
src/App.tsx:              className="bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-600 text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold transition-all"
src/App.tsx:            >
src/App.tsx:              Adicionar Alimento
src/App.tsx:            </button>
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          <div className="space-y-4">
src/App.tsx:            <MacroProgressBar label="Calorias" current={totals.calories} target={targetPlan?.tdee || 2500} unit="kcal" color="bg-orange-500" />
src/App.tsx:            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
src/App.tsx:              <MacroProgressBar label="Proteína" current={totals.protein} target={targetPlan?.protein_g || 150} unit="g" color="bg-blue-500" />
src/App.tsx:              <MacroProgressBar label="Carbos" current={totals.carbs} target={targetPlan?.carbs_g || 300} unit="g" color="bg-yellow-500" />
src/App.tsx:              <MacroProgressBar label="Gorduras" current={totals.fats} target={targetPlan?.fats_g || 70} unit="g" color="bg-emerald-500" />
src/App.tsx:            </div>
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        <WaterTracker athleteId={athleteId} currentWater={currentWater} targetWater={waterTarget} />
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      {/* Weekly Evolution Chart */}
src/App.tsx:      <div className="bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-6">
src/App.tsx:        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
src/App.tsx:          <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-2">
src/App.tsx:            <TrendingUp size={16} className="text-emerald-500" />
src/App.tsx:            Evolução Semanal de Calorias
src/App.tsx:          </h4>
src/App.tsx:          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase text-zinc-500">
src/App.tsx:            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
src/App.tsx:              <div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500" />
src/App.tsx:              Consumo
src/App.tsx:            </div>
src/App.tsx:            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
src/App.tsx:              <div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-zinc-700" />
src/App.tsx:              Meta ({targetPlan?.tdee || 2500} kcal)
src/App.tsx:            </div>
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:        <div className="h-64 w-full">
src/App.tsx:          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
src/App.tsx:            <AreaChart data={chartData}>
src/App.tsx:              <defs>
src/App.tsx:                <linearGradient id="colorCal" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
src/App.tsx:                  <stop offset="5%" stopColor="#10b981" stopOpacity={0.3}/>
src/App.tsx:                  <stop offset="95%" stopColor="#10b981" stopOpacity={0}/>
src/App.tsx:                </linearGradient>

src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      {/* Diary List */}
src/App.tsx:      <div className="bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-6">

src/App.tsx:        <div className="space-y-3">
src/App.tsx:          {mealLogs.length > 0 ? (
src/App.tsx:            mealLogs.map(log => (
src/App.tsx:              <div key={log.id} className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-zinc-800/30 rounded-2xl border border-white/5 group hover:border-emerald-500/30 transition-all">
src/App.tsx:                <div className="flex items-center gap-4">

src/App.tsx:                  </div>

src/App.tsx:                  </div>

src/App.tsx:                  <div className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500">P: {log.protein}g • C: {log.carbs}g • G: {log.fats}g</div>
src/App.tsx:                </div>
src/App.tsx:              </div>
src/App.tsx:            ))
src/App.tsx:          ) : (
src/App.tsx:            <div className="text-center py-8 text-zinc-500 text-sm italic">Nenhuma refeição registrada hoje.</div>
src/App.tsx:          )}
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      <Modal isOpen={isMealModalOpen} onClose={() => setIsMealModalOpen(false)} title="Registrar Refeição">
src/App.tsx:        <MealLogForm athleteId={athleteId} onSuccess={() => setIsMealModalOpen(false)} />
src/App.tsx:      </Modal>
src/App.tsx:    </div>
src/App.tsx:  );
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const MacroProgressBar = ({ label, current, target, unit, color }: { label: string, current: number, target: number, unit: string, color: string }) => {
src/App.tsx:  const percentage = Math.min(100, (current / target) * 100);
src/App.tsx:  const isOver = current > target;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="space-y-1.5">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="flex justify-between items-end">
src/App.tsx:        <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-widest">{label}</span>
src/App.tsx:        <span className={cn("text-xs font-black", isOver ? "text-rose-500" : "text-white")}>
src/App.tsx:          {current} / {target.toFixed(0)} <span className="text-[10px] font-normal text-zinc-500">{unit}</span>
src/App.tsx:        </span>
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:      <div className="w-full h-2 bg-zinc-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
src/App.tsx:        <motion.div 
src/App.tsx:          initial={{ width: 0 }}
src/App.tsx:          animate={{ width: `${percentage}%` }}
src/App.tsx:          className={cn("h-full transition-all", isOver ? "bg-rose-500" : color)}
src/App.tsx:        />
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:    </div>
src/App.tsx:  );
src/App.tsx:};

src/App.tsx:  const calculateMacros = () => {
src/App.tsx:    // Calculate BMR (Mifflin-St Jeor)
src/App.tsx:    const bmr = formData.gender === 'M' 
src/App.tsx:      ? (10 * formData.weight) + (6.25 * formData.height) - (5 * formData.age) + 5
src/App.tsx:      : (10 * formData.weight) + (6.25 * formData.height) - (5 * formData.age) - 161;

src/App.tsx:    let tdee = bmr * formData.activity_level;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Adjust for goal
