server.ts:  // Final catch-all for API
server.ts:  app.use("/api/*", (req, res) => {
server.ts:    res.status(404).json({ error: "API route not found" });
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Vite or Static serving
server.ts:  const distPath = path.resolve(process.cwd(), "dist");
server.ts:  
server.ts:  if (fs.existsSync(distPath)) {
server.ts:    console.log("Serving static files from:", distPath);
server.ts:    app.use(express.static(distPath));
server.ts:    
server.ts:    // SPA Fallback - must be AFTER express.static
server.ts:    app.get("*", (req, res) => {
server.ts:      if (req.url.startsWith('/api/')) {
server.ts:        return res.status(404).json({ error: "API route not found" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      res.sendFile(path.join(distPath, "index.html"));
server.ts:    });
server.ts:  } else {
server.ts:    console.log("Dist folder not found, starting Vite middleware...");
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const vite = await createViteServer({
server.ts:        server: { middlewareMode: true, hmr: false },
server.ts:        appType: "spa",
server.ts:      });
server.ts:      app.use(vite.middlewares);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      app.get("*", async (req, res, next) => {
server.ts:        if (req.url.startsWith('/api/')) return next();
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:          const url = req.originalUrl;
server.ts:          let template = fs.readFileSync(path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'index.html'), 'utf-8');
server.ts:          template = await vite.transformIndexHtml(url, template);
server.ts:          res.status(200).set({ 'Content-Type': 'text/html' }).end(template);
server.ts:        } catch (e) {
server.ts:          next(e);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    } catch (e) {
server.ts:      console.error("Vite failed:", e);
server.ts:      app.get("*", (req, res) => res.status(500).send("Server Error: Vite failed to start"));
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Error handler
server.ts:  app.use((err: any, req: any, res: any, next: any) => {
server.ts:    console.error("Unhandled error:", err);
server.ts:    res.status(500).send("Internal Server Error");
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  server.listen(PORT, "0.0.0.0", () => {
server.ts:    console.log(`Server listening on port ${PORT}`);
server.ts:  });
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:startServer().catch((err) => {
server.ts:  console.error("Failed to start server:", err);
server.ts:  process.exit(1);
server.ts:});

firestore.rules:rules_version = '2';
firestore.rules:service cloud.firestore {
firestore.rules:  match /databases/{database}/documents {
firestore.rules:    
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:    // Assumed Data Model
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:    //
firestore.rules:    // Collection: users
firestore.rules:    // Fields: uid, email, role, name, academy_id, unit_ids
firestore.rules:    //
firestore.rules:    // Collection: academies
firestore.rules:    // Fields: name, owner_uid, created_at
firestore.rules:    //
firestore.rules:    // Collection: athletes
firestore.rules:    // Fields: academy_id, unit_id, name, email, pac_score, etc.
firestore.rules:    //
firestore.rules:    // Collection: checkins
firestore.rules:    // Fields: academy_id, athlete_id, schedule_id, date, status
firestore.rules:    //
firestore.rules:    // Collection: posts
firestore.rules:    // Fields: academy_id, athlete_id, content, created_at
firestore.rules:    //
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:    // Helper Functions
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:    
firestore.rules:    function isAuthenticated() {
firestore.rules:      return request.auth != null;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isDeveloper() {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() && 
firestore.rules:        request.auth.token.email == "alphatech.fabio@gmail.com" && 
firestore.rules:        request.auth.token.email_verified == true;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function getUserData() {
firestore.rules:      return get(/databases/$(database)/documents/users/$(request.auth.uid)).data;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isAcademy() {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() && getUserData().role == 'academy';
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isProfessor() {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() && getUserData().role == 'professor';
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isAthlete() {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() && getUserData().role == 'athlete';
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function belongsToAcademy(academyId) {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() && academyId != null && getUserData().academy_id == academyId;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isSameAcademy(data) {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() && data.academy_id != null && getUserData().academy_id == data.academy_id;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isOwner(data) {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() && data.owner_id == request.auth.uid;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // Validation Helpers
firestore.rules:    function hasOnlyAllowedFields(fields) {
firestore.rules:      return request.resource.data.keys().hasOnly(fields);
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function hasRequiredFields(fields) {
firestore.rules:      return request.resource.data.keys().hasAll(fields);
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidString(field, min, max) {
firestore.rules:      return request.resource.data[field] is string && 
firestore.rules:             request.resource.data[field].size() >= min && 
firestore.rules:             request.resource.data[field].size() <= max;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // Domain Validators
firestore.rules:    function isValidUser(data) {
firestore.rules:      return hasRequiredFields(['uid', 'email', 'role']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.uid is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.email is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.role in ['athlete', 'professor', 'academy', 'developer'] &&
firestore.rules:             (!('name' in data) || (data.name is string && data.name.size() <= 100)) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('academy_id' in data) || data.academy_id is string);
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidAcademy(data) {
firestore.rules:      return hasRequiredFields(['name', 'owner_uid']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.name is string && data.name.size() <= 100 &&
firestore.rules:             data.owner_uid is string;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidPost(data) {
firestore.rules:      return hasRequiredFields(['academy_id', 'athlete_id', 'content', 'created_at']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.academy_id is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.athlete_id is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.content is string && data.content.size() <= 2000;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidCheckIn(data) {
firestore.rules:      return hasRequiredFields(['academy_id', 'athlete_id', 'schedule_id', 'date', 'status']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.academy_id is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.athlete_id is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.status in ['pending', 'confirmed', 'cancelled'];
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidAthlete(data) {
firestore.rules:      return hasRequiredFields(['academy_id', 'name']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.academy_id is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.name is string && data.name.size() <= 100;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidPlan(data) {
firestore.rules:      return hasRequiredFields(['academy_id', 'name', 'type', 'frequency', 'basePrice']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.academy_id is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.name is string && data.name.size() <= 100 &&
firestore.rules:             data.basePrice is number && data.basePrice >= 0;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidMedia(data) {
firestore.rules:      return hasRequiredFields(['academy_id', 'title', 'url', 'type']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.academy_id is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.title is string && data.title.size() <= 200 &&
firestore.rules:             isValidUrl(data.url);
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidTechnique(data) {
firestore.rules:      return hasRequiredFields(['name', 'position', 'category', 'belt']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.name is string && data.position is string && data.category is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.belt in ['Branca', 'Azul', 'Roxa', 'Marrom', 'Preta'];
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidTechniqueSubmission(data) {
firestore.rules:      return hasRequiredFields(['technique_id', 'athlete_id', 'video_url', 'status']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.technique_id is string && data.athlete_id is string &&
firestore.rules:             isValidUrl(data.video_url) &&
firestore.rules:             data.status in ['pending', 'validated', 'rejected'];
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidProgress(data) {
firestore.rules:      return hasRequiredFields(['athlete_id', 'technique_id', 'status']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.athlete_id is string && data.technique_id is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.status in ['not_started', 'studying', 'submitted', 'validated'];
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:    // Rules
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    match /users/{userId} {
firestore.rules:      allow read: if isAuthenticated() && (request.auth.uid == userId || isDeveloper() || (isAcademy() && isSameAcademy(resource.data)));
firestore.rules:      allow create: if isAuthenticated() && 
firestore.rules:                    isValidUser(request.resource.data) && (
firestore.rules:        isDeveloper() || 
firestore.rules:        (request.auth.uid == userId && 
firestore.rules:         request.resource.data.role == 'athlete' && // Default role for self-signup
firestore.rules:         exists(/databases/$(database)/documents/whitelist/$(request.auth.token.email.lower())))
firestore.rules:      );
firestore.rules:      allow update: if isAuthenticated() && (
firestore.rules:        isDeveloper() || 
firestore.rules:        (request.auth.uid == userId && 
firestore.rules:         isValidUser(request.resource.data) &&
firestore.rules:         request.resource.data.role == resource.data.role && // Cannot change own role
firestore.rules:         request.resource.data.academy_id == resource.data.academy_id // Cannot change own academy
firestore.rules:        )
firestore.rules:      );
firestore.rules:      allow delete: if isDeveloper();
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    match /whitelist/{email} {
firestore.rules:      allow read, write: if isDeveloper();
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    match /academies/{academyId} {
firestore.rules:      allow read: if isAuthenticated() && (belongsToAcademy(academyId) || isDeveloper());
firestore.rules:      allow create: if isDeveloper();
firestore.rules:      allow update: if isDeveloper() || (isAuthenticated() && isAcademy() && belongsToAcademy(academyId) && isValidAcademy(request.resource.data));
firestore.rules:      allow delete: if isDeveloper();
firestore.rules:      
firestore.rules:      match /units/{unitId} {
firestore.rules:        allow read: if isDeveloper() || belongsToAcademy(academyId);
firestore.rules:        allow write: if isDeveloper() || (isAcademy() && belongsToAcademy(academyId));
firestore.rules:      }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:      match /schedules/{scheduleId} {
firestore.rules:        allow read: if isAuthenticated() && (belongsToAcademy(academyId) || isDeveloper());
firestore.rules:        allow write: if isDeveloper() || (isAcademy() && belongsToAcademy(academyId)) || (isProfessor() && belongsToAcademy(academyId));
firestore.rules:      }
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    match /checkins/{checkinId} {
firestore.rules:      allow read: if isAuthenticated() && (isSameAcademy(resource.data) || isDeveloper());
firestore.rules:      allow create: if isAuthenticated() && 
firestore.rules:                    isValidCheckIn(request.resource.data) &&
firestore.rules:                    isSameAcademy(request.resource.data) &&
firestore.rules:                    (request.resource.data.athlete_id == request.auth.uid || isAcademy() || isProfessor());
firestore.rules:      allow update: if isAuthenticated() && 
firestore.rules:                    isValidCheckIn(request.resource.data) &&
firestore.rules:                    isSameAcademy(resource.data) &&
firestore.rules:                    (resource.data.athlete_id == request.auth.uid || isAcademy() || isProfessor() || isDeveloper());
firestore.rules:      allow delete: if isDeveloper() || (isAuthenticated() && isSameAcademy(resource.data) && isAcademy());
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    match /athletes/{athleteId} {
firestore.rules:      allow read: if isAuthenticated() && (
firestore.rules:        request.auth.uid == athleteId || 
firestore.rules:        isDeveloper() || 
firestore.rules:        (isSameAcademy(resource.data))
firestore.rules:      );
firestore.rules:      allow create: if isDeveloper() || 
firestore.rules:                     (isAcademy() && isSameAcademy(request.resource.data)) ||
firestore.rules:                     (isProfessor() && isSameAcademy(request.resource.data));
firestore.rules:      allow update: if isDeveloper() || 
firestore.rules:                             (isAcademy() && isSameAcademy(resource.data)) ||
firestore.rules:                             (isProfessor() && isSameAcademy(resource.data)) ||
firestore.rules:                             request.auth.uid == athleteId;
firestore.rules:      allow delete: if isDeveloper();
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:      // Sub-collections inherit the same isolation
firestore.rules:      match /{allSubcollections=**} {
firestore.rules:        allow read, write: if isAuthenticated() && (
firestore.rules:          request.auth.uid == athleteId || 
firestore.rules:          isDeveloper() || 
firestore.rules:          isProfessor() ||
firestore.rules:          isAcademy() ||
firestore.rules:          (belongsToAcademy(get(/databases/$(database)/documents/athletes/$(athleteId)).data.academy_id))
firestore.rules:        );
firestore.rules:      }
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    match /posts/{postId} {
firestore.rules:      allow read: if isAuthenticated() && (isSameAcademy(resource.data) || isDeveloper());
firestore.rules:      allow create: if isAuthenticated() && 
firestore.rules:                    isValidPost(request.resource.data) && 
firestore.rules:                    isSameAcademy(request.resource.data);
firestore.rules:      allow update, delete: if isAuthenticated() && 
firestore.rules:                            isSameAcademy(resource.data) &&
